heading: Determinations of Secretary as final and conclusive
label: 1429 Determinations of Secretary as final and conclusive
text: Determinations made by the Secretary under this Act shall be final and conclusive: , That the scope and nature of such determinations shall not be inconsistent with the provisions of the Commodity Credit Corporation Charter Act [ et seq.].Provided15 U.S.C. 714
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , known as the Agricultural Act of 1949, which is classified principally to this chapter (§ 1421 et seq.).
